subject: Commission Calculation Error - Wang Lei
body:
Dear Finance,

I reviewed my March commission payout and found that my commission was only 18,000 yuan. However, I closed deals with Tianyu Tech (300,000) and Mingdao Software (200,000) in March, which at the 5% commission rate should be 25,000 yuan. Please investigate.
-- Wang Lei

subject: Commission Dispute - Li Fang February Commission
body:
I closed Ruifeng Industries (450,000) in February, with a commission of 22,500 yuan (5%), but only received 15,000 yuan. Also, the final payment for Jincheng Logistics (180,000) was received in February, and the 9,000 yuan commission is missing as well. Total additional payment owed: 16,500 yuan.
-- Li Fang

subject: Regarding Zhao Qiang's Commission Appeal
body:
I am appealing the commission for the Huateng Group project (500,000). I handled this project from discovery to signing entirely on my own, but the commission was split between two people. I should receive the full commission of 25,000 yuan, but currently only received 12,500 yuan. Please provide the basis for the commission split.
-- Zhao Qiang

subject: Commission Policy Statement
body:
Dear Colleagues,

The 2026 Q1 commission policy is as follows:
1. Standard commission rate: 5% of deal amount
2. Commission is paid the month after contract payment is received
3. Co-sourced deals are split by contribution ratio, requiring both parties' confirmation
4. Refund/return commissions will be clawed back
5. Additional 2% bonus for exceeding quarterly targets
